core_interpretation: Sensorimotor markers are useful for balance, vestibular and motion-sickness branches; subjective dizziness is not enough.
guardrails: Do not infer vestibular disorder from dizziness alone.
Do not infer postflight pathology from transient adaptation.
Do not infer balance cause without strength, vision, vestibular and orthostatic context.
Do not compare balance/gait metrics without protocol context.
research_gaps: Sparse direct astronaut/space analog data linking operational errors to specific sensorimotor markers.
Few studies integrating orthostatic/cerebral perfusion/fatigue/cognition with sensorimotor outcomes.
